faq.title: Got Questions? We Have Answers
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our platform, implementation, and support services.
faq.stillHaveQuestions: Still have questions? Our team is here to help.

difference.question: What makes Omniflow.id different from other ERP solutions?
difference.answer: Omniflow.id offers a unique combination of comprehensive modules, modern technology, and seamless integration capabilities. Our AI-powered features, intuitive interface, and enterprise-grade security set us apart from traditional ERP systems. We focus on user experience while maintaining powerful functionality.

implementation.question: How long does implementation typically take?
implementation.answer: Implementation time varies based on your business size and requirements. Basic setup takes 2-4 weeks for small businesses, while enterprise implementations typically take 2-3 months. We provide dedicated project managers and 24/7 support throughout the entire process to ensure smooth deployment.

customization.question: Can Omniflow.id be customized for my specific industry?
customization.answer: Absolutely. Omniflow.id is highly customizable and can be tailored to meet the specific needs of your industry. Our modular architecture allows for flexible configuration, custom workflows, and industry-specific features. We have experience across manufacturing, retail, services, and more.

support.question: What kind of support and training do you provide?
support.answer: We provide comprehensive support including 24/7 technical assistance, regular system updates, personalized training sessions, and dedicated account managers. Our support team includes certified experts who understand your business needs and can provide strategic guidance.

security.question: How secure is my data with Omniflow.id?
security.answer: Security is our top priority. We maintain ISO 27001 certification, use enterprise-grade encryption, implement multi-factor authentication, and conduct regular security audits. Your data is stored in secure, compliant data centers with 99.9% uptime guarantee.

integration.question: Can I integrate Omniflow.id with my existing systems?
integration.answer: Yes, Omniflow.id offers robust integration capabilities with popular business tools, accounting software, CRM systems, and third-party applications. Our API-first approach ensures seamless data flow between systems, minimizing disruption to your current workflows.

contacts.title: Contact Management
contacts.description: Easily manage contact databases. Import contacts in bulk, segment based on criteria, and track interaction status with each contact.

audio.title: TTS Audio & Scripts
audio.description: Create professional audio messages with Text-to-Speech. Manage telemarketing scripts, generate audio automatically, and save in audio library.

autodial.title: Auto Dialer
autodial.description: Smart autodial system integrated with Twilio. Run automated calls to contact lists with selected audio scripts.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Real-time analytics dashboard to monitor telemarketing campaign performance. Call logs reports, conversion rates, and complete statistics.

scripts.title: Telemarketing Scripts
scripts.description: Create and manage professional telemarketing scripts. Ready-to-use templates for various industries and call purposes.

templates.title: Message Templates
templates.description: Customizable message template library. Personalize messages with dynamic variables to increase engagement.

scheduling.title: Campaign Scheduling
scheduling.description: Schedule telemarketing campaigns to run automatically at optimal times. Set call schedules based on target time zones.

logs.title: Call Logs & History
logs.description: Complete history of every call with status details, duration, and callbacks. Integration with CRM system for follow-up tracking.

benefits.title: Telemarketing System Advantages
benefits.subtitle: Increase your telemarketing team's efficiency with Omniflow Telemarketing's superior features.

conversion.title: Higher Conversion Rates
conversion.description: With professional scripts and optimized autodial, increase your telemarketing campaign conversion rates by up to 40%.

fastSettlement.title: Fast Settlement
fastSettlement.description: Funds deposited to your account within 1-2 business days. Smoother cashflow for business operations.

fraudProtection.title: Fraud Protection
fraudProtection.description: Advanced fraud detection system with machine learning to protect your business from suspicious transactions.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.description: System designed with telemarketing regulations in mind. Integrated DNC (Do Not Call) and opt-out management features.

costEffective.title: Affordable Pricing
costEffective.description: Transparent fee structure with no hidden setup costs. Save money with competitive rates for your business.

efficiency.title: Operational Efficiency
efficiency.description: Call automation saves your team's time. Focus on quality leads and effective follow-ups.

reach.title: Wider Reach
reach.description: Reach thousands of contacts in a short time with a reliable autodial system. Integration with global telecommunications networks.

automation.title: Full Automation
automation.description: From TTS audio creation to result reporting, all processes are automated for maximum efficiency.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: Allocate leads to telemarketing agents, monitor team performance, and set KPI targets easily from one dashboard.

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of companies that have optimized their telemarketing operations with Omniflow. Schedule a demo to see how our platform can help your business.
